PROP-01b-partial-inv-032.text: Price decay must be monotonically non-increasing over auction duration.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-032.assertion: forall t1 < t2 <= duration: priceMultiplier(t1) >= priceMultiplier(t2)

locations.note: priceMultiplier linear decay formula at lines 793-797; monotonicity depends on correct elapsed clamping
